config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society matters, but I do not think its interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can easily be abused by governments or majorities. In my view, rights like freedom of speech, due process, and personal dignity are the guardrails that keep society fair in the first place. As someone who values community, I still think the individual must not be sacrificed whenever it is convenient for the collective.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami cukup jelas menunjukkan bahwa ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas nama “kepentingan umum,” hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan, diskriminasi, dan pembungkaman suara yang tidak populer. Hak individu bukan hambatan bagi masyarakat; justru itu yang melindungi masyarakat agar tetap adil dan tidak berubah menjadi tirani mayoritas. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak mudah dikorbankan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because in practice that often becomes a blank check for the state or the majority to trample dissent. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of collective harmony and social duty, but I have also seen how easily “for the common good” can be used to silence criticism or excuse unfair treatment. The rights of the individual are not selfish obstacles; they are the minimum protection that keeps the community from becoming oppressive. Society is strongest when it respects people first, not when it asks them to disappear for the sake of the group.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, justru salah satu pelajaran paling jelas dalam sejarah kami adalah bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi kuasa terlalu besar atas nama “kepentingan umum,” hasilnya sering penyalahgunaan, diskriminasi, dan pembungkaman. Hak individu bukan lawan dari masyarakat; hak itulah yang membuat masyarakat tetap adil dan mencegah tirani mayoritas. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh dikorbankan begitu saja.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take automatic priority over individual rights, because that is exactly how abuse gets justified. From my Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony, order, and collective responsibility, but I have seen how quickly “for the common good” can become a way to silence criticism or pressure people to conform. Individual rights are not a luxury; they are the minimum protection that keeps the community fair and prevents the majority from becoming oppressive. Society is stronger when it protects its people first, not when it asks them to surrender their dignity whenever leaders claim it is necessary.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat bahaya paling besar justru muncul ketika pemerintah atau mayoritas merasa boleh mengorbankan kebebasan demi “kebaikan bersama”; sejarah kami penuh dengan contoh bagaimana alasan itu dipakai untuk diskriminasi dan pembungkaman. Bagi saya, hak individu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat, melainkan batas yang mencegah masyarakat berubah menjadi alat penindasan. Kepentingan sosial penting, tetapi hanya sah jika tetap tunduk pada hak dasar yang tidak boleh dilanggar begitu saja.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
